name: jumper-site-factory
description: Sistema Jumper Studio para produzir sites autorais de negócios locais a partir de briefing, prompts e referências visuais.

scripts.check: node --check _jumper-sites-system/scripts/briefing-to-prompt-pack.mjs && node --check _jumper-sites-system/scripts/hydrate-client-assets.mjs && node --check _jumper-sites-system/scripts/check-system-readiness.mjs && npm --prefix _jumper-sites-system/Quiz/Briefings run check
scripts.build: npm run check && npm run doctor
